scope.details: The target change set stayed inside web_design_ui index/script/style files, tests/test_web_design_ui.py, contour screenshots, and Phosphor PNG icon additions.

command_boundaries.details: Diagnostics keeps export_diagnostics as the only active Diagnostics command path. Full-check, lifecycle, human-open, and danger affordances are disabled/deferred.

browser_payloads.details: Browser payload keys remain bounded to ui_action plus existing account_id/route_id surfaces; no new payload keys were added.

visual_fit.details: After screenshots are 1600x1000 and DOM metrics show mainScrollHeight equals mainClientHeight, no horizontal overflow, diagnostics bottom below the 934px acceptance line, and zero visible svg elements inside #diagnosticsScreen.

live_failure_truth.details: Live integration failure shows deferred/no-history state and does not reuse old healthy fixture history.

leak_scan.details: No forbidden external reference service strings were found in the target diff.

tests.details: node --check passed; python3 -m unittest tests.test_web_design_ui tests.test_web_design_live_server tests.test_web_design_command_adapter -q passed with 87 tests.

commands_run_by_auditor: git diff --stat -- web_design_ui/index.html scripts/overview.js styles/overview.css tests/test_web_design_ui.py audit_results/ui_web_diagnostics_signal_detail_stabilization_pass_screenshots
rg -n action and payload boundary markers
